academic.name: Analysis of Johnson-Nyquist Noise in Electrical Components
descriptions: Performed a series of experiments in an electrical laboratory investigating the effect of cosmic background noise on resistors.
Wrote a Physical Review Letter on the findings and presenting the results to fellow students and professors.

academic.name: AM Radio Receiver
descriptions: Constructed a protoype tunable AM radio receiver from scratch as a part of an experimental physics course.
Followed circuit diagram schemes to assemble the radio.

academic.name: Characterisation of Semiconducting Materials
descriptions: Extracted material information of a semiconducting material using a four-point probing technique called the Van der Pauw method.
Compiled a scientific paper on the results and its implications for future quantum computing hardware.
Processed and classified semiconductor data using NumPy and Pandas.

academic.name: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials with Keras API
descriptions: Implemented a neural network model that regresses energies of crystalline atomic structures as an alternative to density functional theory methods.
Employed feature engineering, cross-validation, and hyperparameter tuning to search for an optimal model.

academic.name: Classification of Habitable Planets
descriptions: Applied different machine learning algorithms to the NASA exoplanet dataset to determine the most accurate model for classifying potentially habitable planets.
Selected appropriate models using scikit-learn, along with NumPy and Pandas through JupyterLab.

academic.name: Numerical Simulations of Physical Phenomena
descriptions: Wrote a program that demonstrates the physical behaviour of two colliding galaxies. (https://youtu.be/Y3ONGXlxWSY)
Designed and wrote simulations of quantum particles to analyse the time-dependence of 2-dimensional wavefunctions.
Animated the behaviour of electron spins in a ferromagnetic lattice (Ising Model).

academic.name: Battleship-inspired Video Game
descriptions: Constructed a Battleship-inspired Video Game, which featured a user system and data persistence.
Gained experience in Java programming, emphasising clean code practices and modular design.
Demonstrated proficiency in software construction methodologies through systematic design and testing.

academic.name: Text-based Single-user Dungeon
descriptions: Created a simple single-user dungeon in Python in which the player interacts with the command line to play the game.
Adhered to standard systems development cycle which includes planning, analysis, design, and implementation.
